title: Cryptool partners with Web3Port to accelerate Web3 innovation
content_html:
Cryptool has teamed up with Web3Port, a matchmaking protocol that connects start-ups, contributors and capital across the Web3 ecosystem.

Together with Web3Port we are focusing on three areas:

  • Faster innovation cycles for early-stage Web3 teams
  • Bringing start-ups and contributors together in one place
  • Practical fundraising support for projects that are ready to grow

This is the first of several partnerships that will help Cryptool deliver a serious, end-to-end platform for crypto investment management.
author: Cryptool
